columns.name: Firma
columns.description: The unique identifier for the company

columns.name: KundeKonto
columns.description: The customer account number associated with the transaction

columns.name: Kontotype
columns.description: The type of account, such as savings or checking

columns.name: TransType
columns.description: The type of transaction, such as deposit or withdrawal

columns.name: BilagNr
columns.description: The invoice number related to the transaction

columns.name: BilagDato
columns.description: The date of the invoice associated with the transaction

columns.name: RentenDato
columns.description: The date when rent was due or paid

columns.name: Belop
columns.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction

columns.name: Merknad
columns.description: A note or additional information related to the transaction

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp of when the transaction occurred

columns.name: BrukerId
columns.description: The identifier for the user who performed the transaction
